title: Fix footer background so Admin Sign In link text is legible

requirements.summary: Update the Footer component background color in the bottom section to ensure all text (Admin Sign In link, visitor counters, copyright) is legible with sufficient contrast using existing design system colors
acceptanceCriteria: The footer bottom section background color is explicitly set so that all text within it (copyright, visitor counters, Admin Sign In link) is legible without hovering.
The 'Admin Sign In' link text is fully visible at resting state with sufficient contrast against the footer background.
Visitor counter labels ('Total Visits', 'Unique Visitors') are readable against the footer background.
Copyright text is readable against the footer background.
The chosen colors are sourced from the existing design system palette (warm beige #F5F0E8, charcoal #2C2C2C, or white #FFFFFF).
The fix is consistent across all viewport sizes (mobile, tablet, desktop).

file_operations.description: Update the bottom section of the Footer component to apply an explicit background color (e.g., bg-charcoal or bg-warm-beige) and ensure all text elements including the Admin Sign In link, visitor counters, and copyright use contrasting text colors from the design system (text-warm-beige, text-charcoal, or text-white). If the background is dark (charcoal), use light text (warm-beige or white). If the background is light (warm-beige), use dark text (charcoal). Apply these classes consistently to the bottom bar container and all nested text/link elements to meet WCAG contrast requirements across all viewport sizes.
